# Bucket distribution: >=20:18q >=16:16q >=12:31q <12:35q
# KEY FINDING: recall loss is NOT from Ada-ef cutting too hard.
# The <12 bucket (35 hardest queries) has recall=0.933 at ef=200 (full budget).
# Easy queries (>=20) hold recall=0.963 with ef=150 (saves 75 blk/q).
# Ada-ef correctly identifies easy vs hard; hard queries are inherently hard at ef=200.
# Per-bucket breakdown (identical for warm/cold — deterministic scoring):
# bucket     n  recall  blk/q avg_ef
